meaning: n.面包师,面包工人,<美>(便携式)烘炉
examples: Mr. Baker would take command of the campaign.
Nick Faldo was beaten by Peter Baker in a playoff.
I am delighted to make your acquaintance, Mrs Baker.
While many are concerned about this, Dean Baker argues it is not a problem.
To give an example, consider this article by Luke Baker and Deepa Babington from Reuters.
